title: fullbright+
description: This mod will increase your gamma without mod conflicts or errors.
body: # 💡 Fullbright > A lightweight, highly compatible Fullbright mod that simply works. No complex setups, no mod conflicts—just perfect vision in the dark. --- ### 🌟 Core Features * **Perfect Visibility:** Instantly illuminates caves, the Nether, and the night sky. Never miss an ore or an enemy hiding in the shadows. * **Maximum Compatibility:** Unlike many other large Fullbright or lighting mods, this mod is built to be extremely lightweight and perfectly compatible with the vast majority of other mods and modpacks without causing crashes or conflicts. --- ### ⌨️ Controls * **Default Toggle:** Press **`F7`** to instantly turn Fullbright on or off. * **Customizable:** You can easily change this keybind at any time in the standard Minecraft Controls menu. ---
